name: No-Egg Egg Salad
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz Firm tofu, drained and crumbled
2 tbsp Finely chopped green or red bell pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the crumbled tofu with finely chopped carrot.
2. Add the bell pepper and celery (if using), green onion, turmeric, salt, black pepper, hot sauce, vinegar, and mustard.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
4. Stir in the soy mayonnaise (if using) and taste to adjust seasoning if needed.
5. Serve 4 sandwiches or 6-8 as a dip.
